section_2.mandate: Abolish 'Phases' and 'Organs'. Execute Simultaneous Concurrency by explicitly chaining specific V3.9 Keys and Praxial Keys together.

simultaneous_concurrency_matrix.fractal_anatomy: Entity scales infinitely, geometry dictated by [Substrate Valency Threshold].
simultaneous_concurrency_matrix.specific_key_and_praxial key_integration: Any detailed geometry change MUST instantaneously trigger ['Multi-Layer Autopoietic Syntax-Morphing Transduction'], drain ['Thermodynamic Escrow'] via the ['Transduction-Fallacy Guillotine'], echo via ['Mycelial Spore-Routing'], and crush into ['Ontological Sedimentation'].
